title: Common Units in English and Metric Recipes
content:
Volume

1 teaspoon (tsp) = 5 ml
1 tablespoon (tbsp) = 3 teaspoons = 15 ml
1 fluid ounce (fl oz) = 2 tablespoons = 30 ml
1 cup = 16 tablespoons = 8 fl oz = 240 ml
1 pint = 2 cups = 16 fl oz = 475 ml
1 quart = 2 pints = 4 cups = 950 ml
1 liter = 1000 ml ≈ 4¼ cups
1 gallon = 4 quarts = 16 cups = 3.8 liters

Weight

1 ounce (oz) = 28 grams (g)
1 pound (lb) = 16 ounces = 454 grams
1 kilogram (kg) = 1000 grams ≈ 2.2 pounds

Temperature

250°F = 120°C (very low oven)
300°F = 150°C (low oven)
325°F = 165°C
350°F = 175°C (moderate oven)
375°F = 190°C
400°F = 205°C (hot oven)
425°F = 220°C
450°F = 230°C (very hot oven)

Pan Sizes

8-inch round pan = 20 cm
9-inch round pan = 23 cm
9x13-inch baking pan = 23x33 cm
10-inch skillet = 25 cm
